name: Sandy Adams
bio: Sandy Adams serves as the Mayor of Jasper, the county seat of Jasper County in deep East Texas. Jasper is the gateway to Sam Rayburn Reservoir and the Angelina National Forest. The mayor works with the city council to promote tourism, outdoor recreation, and community development.
campaignPromises: Promote Sam Rayburn Reservoir and outdoor recreation tourism
Support economic development and job growth
Foster community unity and civic engagement
